subcodes.first_line: O Mine aunt! We have gathered the pearls of utterance from the Ocean of the All-Merciful's grace and sent them unto thee. I swear by the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عمه لئالی بیان از عمان رحمت رحمن اخذ نمودیم و بسوی تو فرستادیم قسم بافتاب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
